title: Marriage
description: The Marriage plugin is a complex in—game feature that provides players with a wide range of opportunities to model and enhance marital relationships. Players can choose their gender identity, marry other players, and participate in collaborative activities
body:
The Marriage plugin is an innovative add–on for your Minecraft server that adds a marriage system, making the gameplay more social and fun.

* What does the plugin add?
Marriage system – players can create couples, strengthening their relationships in the game.

Flexibility of choice – support for any gender combinations (M+W, M+M, W+W).

Joint bonuses are unique benefits for spouses, such as enhanced stats or special abilities.

Teleportation to a partner is an opportunity to instantly move to your soulmate.

Gift exchange – give your loved ones game items, strengthening the bond.

Romantic interactions are special animations and emotions for couples in love.

Why should I install it?
 Improves the social experience – players will be able to pair up, which will increase engagement in the project.  
✅ Flexibility and customization – customize bonuses and conditions for your server.  
✅ Easy to use – intuitive commands and interface.  
✅ Multiplayer support – ideal for RPG, RP and other genre servers.  

With Marriage, your server will become more comfortable, and the players will be happier! 💍✨
